personas.name: Julia Anderson
personas.role: London office; reports missing £2,500 on payslip via HR Service Bot DM

personas.name: Priya Nair
personas.role: Runs regional reconciler in #hr-payroll-operations and approves off-cycle correction batch

personas.name: Slackbot
personas.role: HR Service Bot: reconciles Workday and ADP, logs incidents, surfaces batch payroll remediation

content.text: Hey, I just checked my payslip and it looks like I'm missing £2,500. Can you log an incident for me?

content.statusText: Cross-checking Workday, ADP, and this pay cycle for London / EMEA GBP…

content.text:
Hi Julia—I've noticed something off, and I'm glad you pinged me.

*What I checked in your workspace*
• Workday: your approved base + London allowance for February
• ADP: what actually landed on this payslip
• Result: you're short *£2,500* versus what Workday sent over

*What happens next*
• I'll log a payroll incident tied to your record and attach these snapshots
• I'll flag payroll ops in *#hr-payroll-operations* with a regional scan—this pattern usually isn't one person only
• I'll keep you updated right here in DM

This doesn't look like a one-off typo on your profile; it matches a sync issue on the EMEA GBP lane. When you're ready, log the incident and I'll take it from there.

Choose an action below to continue.

content.statusText: Logging INC-PAY-2044 and running the regional correlation scan…

content.text:
I've handled the paperwork on your side, Julia.

*Your incident*
• ID: *INC-PAY-2044*
• Amount flagged: *£2,500* (February cycle, London)
• I've attached Workday vs ADP snapshots for the payroll team

I'm escalating to *#hr-payroll-operations* now so they can correct this at the batch level. You'll hear from me here as soon as there's a payment date.
Regional payroll sync alert triggered by employee report (Julia Anderson, London).

caseFields.label: Root cause (AI assessment)
caseFields.value: EMEA GBP payroll bridge sync dropped recurring allowance rows for Feb 2026 cycle

caseFields.label: Recommended action
caseFields.value: Run regional reconciler → approve off-cycle correction file to ADP

content.caseNote: Priya—you can reconcile all 76 in one pass; employee DMs will update automatically after submit.

content.statusText: Replaying Workday → ADP delta for EMEA GBP Feb 2026…

content.text:
I've noticed the full picture now—thanks to Julia's report, we caught it before the problem spread further across the cycle.

*Reconciler results*
• *76* employees with the same missing allowance mapping
• Per-person fix: restore *£2,500* where that allowance applies (a few rows vary by grade; I've normalized in the file)
• Off-cycle file *OC-EMEA-2026-02-B* is staged in ADP

You can approve the batch correction and I'll notify everyone affected in Slack once ADP accepts the file.

Choose an action below to continue.

content.statusText: Submitting off-cycle file to ADP and queuing employee notifications…

content.text:
I've handled the submission, Priya.

*What just landed*
• ADP accepted *OC-EMEA-2026-02-B*
• *76* corrections queued for the next off-cycle pay run
• Incident *INC-PAY-2044* linked to the batch for audit

Affected employees (including Julia) are getting a clear DM with timing next. Nice work closing the loop at scale.

Julia—quick update, and thank you again for flagging this.

*Your pay*
• We've confirmed the *£2,500* miss was part of a regional sync issue—not something you did wrong
• Payroll approved an off-cycle correction; you're in the batch with *75* colleagues who had the same mapping gap
• Funds should hit on the *next off-cycle date* shown in your payroll calendar (I'll sync if that slips)

If anything still looks off after it posts, ping me here and I'll re-reconcile with Workday and ADP immediately.
